name: Fadhal Shulhan.
title: Product Designer
description: Experienced UI/UX Researcher and Designer with 5 years of experience and a Bachelor’s in Information Systems, skilled in end-to-end product design for web and mobile, focused on user-centric solutions in e-commerce, marketplace, and health tech, achieving high app ratings and user satisfaction.
Hello, I’m Fadhal Shulhan, a 27-year-old UI/UX researcher and designer with a Bachelor’s degree in Information Systems from Universitas Multimedia Nusantara, graduating with a GPA of 3.37/4.00.

With extensive experience in end-to-end product design, I have a strong grasp of user-centric analysis and visualization for both web and mobile platforms. My skills in problem-solving and collaboration enable me to thrive in both team-based and independent settings.

Today, I’m privileged to work on projects that create accessible, inclusive digital experiences for a diverse range of users. My work consistently receives high ratings, with an average app score of 4.5 and a very satisfied user satisfaction index. I also bring expertise in e-commerce, marketplace, and health technology industries.
I am dedicated to developing user-focused solutions that enhance the user experience and deliver meaningful results.
skills: Front-End Programming (Ongoing Learning): HTML, CSS, React.js,
